title: scrophularia nodosa var. californica
intro: Scrophularia nodosa var. californica, also known as California figwort, is a variety of the Scrophularia nodosa plant, a flowering perennial native to California in the western United States. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of California figwort include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. California figwort can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
